description_long: This wardrobe consists of two large, rectangular units placed side by side, each featuring a modern, minimalist design. The front of one unit displays three sliding doors, two of which are dark and one is a lighter blue, framed by black borders. The other unit reveals an open interior with multiple compartments, including shelves, cubbies, and hanging spaces, all in a clean white finish. The sides and back panels are solid and dark, contrasting with the lighter front and interior. The wardrobe appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, with possible laminate or painted surfaces for durability and aesthetics. Its overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as apartments, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, dual-unit wardrobe with sliding doors and open shelving, featuring a mix of dark, blue, and white finishes. The design is sleek, functional, and well-suited for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The rear and side panels of both wardrobe units are visible, showing solid, unadorned surfaces in a dark color.
description_view_1: The front of the wardrobe is shown, with one unit displaying three sliding doors (two dark, one blue) and the other revealing an open, compartmentalized interior.
description_view_2: A partial side and front view highlights the sliding doors on one unit and the detailed shelving and compartments of the other.
description_view_3: The back and side panels of the wardrobe are visible, emphasizing the solid, minimalist construction.
